creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
we have a few boxes running stable/12 over here, which use i350 (instead of the i354) and they are running quite fine. hope that gives you guys a glue on troubleshooting this issue:

12.1-STABLE r354143 amd64 1201500 1201500

    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'I350 Gigabit Network Connection'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet
